mapper.sql: id, room_id, user_id, start_datetime, end_datetime, status, total_price, memo, payment_status, payment_id, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted
r.id, r.room_id, r.user_id, r.start_datetime, r.end_datetime, r.status, r.total_price, r.memo, r.payment_status, r.payment_id, r.created_at, r.created_by, r.updated_at, r.updated_by, r.deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rental_reservation ( room_id, user_id, start_datetime, end_datetime, status, total_price, memo, payment_status, payment_id, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{userId}, #{startDatetime}, #{endDatetime}, #{status}, #{totalPrice}, #{memo}, #{paymentStatus}, #{paymentId}, #{createdAt}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedAt}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE rental_reservation SET status = #{status}, total_price = #{totalPrice}, memo = #{memo}, payment_status = #{paymentStatus}, payment_id = #{paymentId}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM rental_reservation WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT , u.name AS user_name FROM rental_reservation r LEFT JOIN `user` u ON r.user_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE r.id = #{id} AND r.deleted = 0
SELECT , u.name AS user_name FROM rental_reservation r LEFT JOIN "user" u ON r.user_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE r.id = #{id} AND r.deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM rental_reservation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY start_datetime DESC

SELECT id, room_id AS roomId, user_id AS userId, NULL AS userName, start_datetime AS start, end_datetime AS end, status, total_price AS totalPrice, memo FROM rental_reservation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY start_datetime DESC

SELECT
FROM rental_reservation WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted = 0 AND status IN (#{requestedStatus}, #{confirmedStatus}) AND ( (start_datetime < #{end} AND end_datetime > #{start}) )
